summary: Renders 3D geometry to a texture without requiring a Camera COMP or Light COMP — a built-in default camera and lighting are provided. Perfect for quick previews of a single Geometry COMP, Render Pass-style sketches, or POP-driven visuals.

key_params.name: geometry
key_params.note: Path to Geometry COMP(s) to render

key_params.name: bgcolor
key_params.note: Background color (replaces needing a Constant TOP behind)

common_gotchas: Use this when you don't need camera animation or multiple lights — for full control switch to Render TOP.
Built-in lighting is fixed; can't be customized. If your shader expects specific light directions, use Render TOP.
Great pair with Trace POP / Triangulate POP / Render POP workflows where the scene is just geometry, no camera rig.
